title: URBNLIVING TML Beige Rectangular Laundry Basket
description: These vibrant coloured hipster laundry baskets add a fun feel to any laundry room without compromising on practicality. Holding up to 55 litres of laundry, the oval shape and the lightweight material on this laundry basket, will make transporting your washing easy. The basket is made of sturdy plastic and comes in 5 vibrant colours. This product had been designed and produced here in Britain by one of the UK's leading manufacturers in plastic homewares, for domestic, commercial and industrial use. By using innovative design, ultra modern injection moulding machines and cutting edge robotic technology, we are able to bring you a superior calibre product at highly competitive pricing enabling you to kit out your home with affordable, stylish and quality goods. Brand: URBNLIVING Deluxe laundry basket Capacity: 55 Litre Easy To Clean & Maintain Lightweight & Durable Comes In 5 Colours Dimensions (HxWxD): 24x40x59cm
